column1: # Arg-fix rewriters (PR2): functions whose IronCalc target uses a
# different argument shape from 1-2-3. Each test exercises the
# off-by-one or format-string rewrite end-to-end so a regression in
# the rewriter shows up as a wrong cell value, not just a wrong
# @FIND(needle, haystack, start) — both start and result are 0-based.
# First "l" in "hello" is at position 2 (h=0, e=1, l=2).
# Searching from past the first hit finds the next one.
# Zero-decimal form must NOT produce a trailing `.`.
# Composed: @MID applied to @FIND's result. Verifies arg-fix nests
# Find "w" in "hello world" → 6. MID from 6, length 5 → "world".
